# Sale Product Set Sale by packaging

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:bc76bf83d0a505b5bb676d2d4553aafe771f673bce44e37c8ecb78222f3ee25a
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

Glue module between `sale_by_packaging` and `sale_product_set_packaging_qty`.

If `sell_only_by_packaging` is ON and there are product set lines without packaging selected,
a warning is displayed in the product form and quick link to all involved lines allows to review them.

:::{IMPORTANT}
This is an alpha version, the data model and design can change at any time without warning.
Only for development or testing purpose, do not use in production.
[More details on development status](https://odoo-community.org/page/development-status)
:::

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_product_set_sale_by_packaging.models.product_set_line.ProductSetLine.cron_check_packaging
documentation:
Ensure lines are tied to the right packaging.

When

* packaging cannot be sold anymore
* lines are tied to a product that can be sold only by packaging
  and have no packaging

change the packaging on the line to the 1st saleable packaging.

methods.name: odoo.addons.sale_product_set_sale_by_packaging.models.product_template.ProductTemplate._product_ids_to_check
documentation: Retrieves product.product IDS to check on product sets.
